app.name: Postpartum Compass
app.promise: EPDS-style perinatal mood risk screening with ongoing check-ins and real local resource connections
app.targetUser: Pregnant or postpartum parent worried about their mood, afraid of being judged or reported
app.mechanic: validated mood screen + longitudinal check-ins + resource connector
app.one_sentence_promise: EPDS-style perinatal mood risk screening with ongoing check-ins and real local resource connections
